intro: Warning: May cause sudden tactical overthinking.
description:
Step into the fight exactly as it happens — no filters, no hero shots, just you, your weapon, and the harsh truth of close-quarters combat.
Bodycamera FPS throws you straight into the action with a true body-cam perspective, where every movement feels raw, shaky, and dangerously real.

This isn’t run-and-gun chaos. It’s tight corners, split-second decisions, and the kind of tension that makes you hold your breath without noticing. Every peek matters. Every sound counts. Every mistake is loud.

Think before you push. Communicate or crumble. Clear rooms with precision, read the environment like your life depends on it, and trust your instincts when everything goes sideways.

Fast? Not always. Intense? Always.

When the lens becomes your eyes… there’s nowhere to hide.
